library.name: libcurl
library.notes: Baseline target for behaviors already accepted by the embedded curl parser.

method.message: libcurl supports explicit and inferred HTTP methods.

proxy.message: libcurl supports HTTP and HTTPS proxy configuration.

redirects.message: libcurl supports redirect following and limits.

timeout.message: libcurl supports connect and overall timeouts.

http.version.2.message: libcurl supports HTTP/2 when the runtime profile exposes HTTP2.

http.version.3.message: libcurl supports HTTP/3 when the runtime profile exposes HTTP3.

external-ref.message: External input referenced by the curl command cannot be generated as native code.
